message:
style(lexical/cass-compat): rustfmt CASS_SCHEMA_HASH declaration onto two lines

`CASS_SCHEMA_HASH` was bumped in the previous commit to a longer
string that now exceeds the column budget on a single line. rustfmt
wants it split across two lines; apply the split here so `cargo fmt
--check` is clean.

No value change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
